_comment: Chronicle non-secret configuration. Copy this file to config.json and edit. config.json is git-ignored; this example holds the real defaults and is also the fallback when config.json is absent, so a fresh checkout runs as-is. Secrets (passwords) live in secrets.json, not here. See docs/configuration.md.

server._comment: host: bind interface. Default 127.0.0.1 is localhost-only (ADR-0003). Set to your machine's LAN IP, or 0.0.0.0 to bind all interfaces, to serve other devices on your network. port: the HTTP/API/UI port.

comfyui._comment: Base URL of the ComfyUI server used by the local image backend. Point this at another machine (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8188) to run image generation on a remote GPU host.

navidrome._comment: Non-secret Navidrome (Subsonic) settings. Leave url empty to keep the Navidrome music source unavailable. Credentials go in secrets.json.

defaults._comment: Default settings a brand-new user's account inherits. Each is overridable per-user and per-campaign; these are the last-resort fallback. Empty string / null means 'no forced default' (the field stays unset for new users).
